Designed with recycled materials, the mesh upper provides better support, breathability, and comfort. The midsole’s FLYTEFOAM cushioning is formed with organically derived materials. With laser cut details in the tooling, these features lighten the load placed on your body and help conserve resources.

reviews.title: Very comfortable shoe if you don't have flat feet!
reviews.text:
The amount of comfort in this shoe is amazing. It competes easily with $130 overpronation shoes I own aside from no arch support. That's where it failed completely for me. Already tried replacing the insoles with arch support ones but the comfort level wasn't the same sadly. The provided insole is removable but is tacked down with adhesive. Didn't damage the shoes when removing it and with care I was able to put it back in.

So in conclusion, yes these are amazing shoes if you need some overpronation support or if your gait is neutral. In this case I'd highly recommend but sadly it didn't work for me. The shoes look amazing and they feel amazing. The price with the construction of the shoes is an amazing value if you just need some extra support and cushion. I'd consider this shoe to be plush in the midsole and the insole was comfortable but not a lot to make it heavy. If it weren't for my arch I would of ordered another shoe to keep in storage when this one wears out. Great service as usual from Amazon for the free return.

title: ASICS Women's Gel-Cumulus 22 Running Shoes
description: The Gel-Cumulus 22 running shoe is the recommended choice for neutral runners who want a soft and flexible daily trainer with a great fit. This update features a one-piece superior mesh combined with a seamless 3D printing structure that balances support and comfort around the foot, giving you an excellent fit right away. Flytefoam midsole is softer than the previous version for comfortable riding. Under the heel where the foot hits for the first time the ground has been redesigned to better insulate the impact. This new heel design has deeper grooves on the forefoot and a softer midsole foam to give you a soft drive. A durable AHAR rubber sole has been placed in key contact areas to help the Gel-Cumulus 22 shoe withstand a ton of miles.

reviews.title: My First Pair of Slip On Sneakers
reviews.text:
I own more pairs of shoes right now that at any time in my life. Part of the reason is because I am involved in more activities than I was in the past and I am thus in need of more types of shoes. My desire to diversify further led me to get my feet inside a pair of INZCOU Men's Non-Slip Gym Sneakers.

I’ve owned lots of pairs of sneakers, but this is the first time I have owned sneakers that do not have a tongue. Instead, these shoes are slip- on and that makes them a little easier to put on because you don’t have to reach down and pull the tongue out, like you commonly do with other shoes. Once they are slipped into place, you tie and are ready to go.

These shoes fit about as expected. The only small issue I had was with the arch support in one of the shoes- it seemed a little off and it hurt at first. But after walking around for a while, everything is fine now. And since these are the first pair of black sneakers I have ever owned, they match up nicely with my darker jeans. It’s a welcome change from the white sneakers I usually wear.

It’s good to have a variety of shoes and INZCOU sneakers have proven a good addition to my collection. I will still wear traditional sneakers, the type that doesn’t slip on. But I am happy to add this set of sneakers to my growing supply.

title: New Balance Men's 510 V5 Trail Running Shoe
description: Are you looking for a lightweight, durable and supportive pair of trail running shoes? Then your search ends with the New Balance 510v5. Durability on the outside meets responsive comfort inside for a lightweight running shoe that's as ready as you are for a trail run or whatever else your day has in store. Built with a rugged construction, these New Balance trail shoes offer relentless durability that is suitable for various runs both on- and off-road. The lugged outsole on these comfortable running shoes features AT TREAD technology which provides enhanced traction on the trail or the road, while the lightweight injection-molded EVA foam midsole includes both ABZORB technology for impact absorption and an NB Soft + Supportive Insert for memory comfort that lasts. For added protection, the reinforced Toe Protect tip helps protect your toes from rocks, roots and debris so you can go off-road with confidence.
features: 50% Synthetic, 50% Textile
Imported
Rubber sole

Cushioned Running Shoes: ABZORB midsole technology in this runner absorbs impact through a combination of cushioning and compression resistance, and the rubber outsole provides strength and durability
Built-In Off-Road Technology: Toe Protect technology helps protect feet from rocks, roots and debris, while AT Tread on the outsole provides versatile traction during both on- and off-road activities
Plush, Cushioned Running Shoes: These runners feature lightweight injection-molded EVA foam midsoles to provide lightweight cushioning and an NB Soft + Supportive Insert for memory comfort that lasts
Built to Last: With an all-over durable construction and an aggressive lugged outsole, these trail running shoes are designed to stand up to all of your outdoor activities
Athletic Aesthetic: With synthetic and mesh uppers that deliver breathability and a top-quality fit, these running shoes also boast a stylish look to fit in with your active lifestyle

reviews.title: WAY too tight over the foot.  NOT for Diabetics, IMHO!
reviews.text:
I've had these on for about an hour now, so I am sure they are not returnable. That's too bad, because an hour has shown me that they are very uncomfortable. I cannot imagine who would find them wearable. Maybe someone with abnormally narrow feet.

The VERY stretchy material they are made from makes them hard to get on. You MUST use a shoehorn, and even then, it is not easy. They also - unpleasantly - squeeze the foot. After an hour, my toes are getting cold from low circulation! Seriously! Plus, the material does not breathe well, despite it's "perforated" appearance. So my feet are hot and wet.

The laces are just decoration. It's the tight material that holds them on. Plus, the artsy-craftsy arch inset in the instep is an invitation to soiling underneath it, without giving much arch support.
Could these be knock-offs? I assumed the attractive price was because they are a discontinued color. Maybe they are just fakes!.

PS THESE ARE NOT FOR DIABETICS. There is too much restriction of circulation.

I was advised to get "caged" Ultraboosts...the ones that lace normally. (The "cage" is the plastic framework for the laces.) But I liked the color of these.

Big mistake.

title: ASICS Men's Gel-Kayano 26 Running Shoes
description: Celebrate the retro style of the historic Japanese capital in this special edition GEL-KAYANO 26 Retro Tokyo running shoe from ASICS. This updated version combines advanced components with a striking new design that honors Tokyo's heritage. The GEL-KAYANO 26 shoe allows you to tackle long distances in comfort, thanks to the rearfoot GEL technology that's been redesigned for improved shock absorption upon impact. You'll also benefit from a bouncy feel that stems from the FLYTEFOAM Propel midsole technology. The DUOMAX technology in the midsole offers better support and helps resist excessive overpronation while I.G.S. technology promotes smoother propulsion. Additionally, this style is accented with reflective detailing to improve your visibility when running in low light settings. Get the inspiration and support you need to smash your training goals in the special edition GEL-KAYANO 26 Retro Tokyo performance running shoe from ASICS.
features: Synthetic-and-mesh

reviews.title: ASICS Men's Gel-Kayano 26 doesn't work for me
reviews.text:
I really wanted to love these shoes. I bought the Black ones and they looked great. But trying them on was another thing. Under where my toes connect to my feet there is a ridge or slight raised part that I could really feel. From the ridge to the toe of the shoe my toes seemed to slightly drop making the shoe very uncomfortable for me.
I am really glad that I purchased them through Amazon the free return policy worked for me. I sent the shoes back the next morning. The credit showed up the next morning.

reviews.title: Update:Tread showing considerable wear after 70 miles
reviews.text:
Two star: Upper is holding up nicely. Tread is already worn out after only 70 miles. I tried ASICS because reviews talk of superior durability. So far for me upper is good, sole is not.

Update: I reached out to ASICS about the tread life. After sending pictures of tread wear after 70 miles they sent code for replacement shoe from ASICS.com.
That’s pretty awesome customer service in my book.

So far 20 miles on new Kayano fit and finish is great.

Comfort on gel-Kayano 28 is far superior to previous models.

Extra wide is a touch narrow but all in all the first 20 miles is running great.

reviews.title: He’ll only wear ASICS
reviews.text: My husband buys one pair of shoes a year (imagine that!). Of course, he wears them every single day—365 days! ASICS are the best fit and most comfortable for him. They’re fit true to size and are just as advertised. He’s very happy!

reviews.title: durable and comfortable
reviews.text: OK, so I was not expecting these to be comfortable for my 12.5hr shifts, nor was I expecting them to be durable. Surprise!! They are both. I am a nurse, enough said about comfort. I got poop on them, washed them in my washing machine, expecting to remove tattered and torn, I found them clean and INTACT!!!!! The color is just as bright as the day I  bought them. My coworkers are spending $150 or more on HOKA and I got these cheeeeap!! I love them!!!! Plus, when it rains they don't squeak????? I was so surprised, I don't know what to say about that. The heel is see thru and there isn't even any water inside after washing them. Sized very accurate, if anything they were 1/2 inch longer than expected. I wear a 7.5 in womens U.S. and these are not tight AT ALL, if I had gotten an 8, which I normally do when buying online and especially foreign, I would have been in trouble. Get them! I am getting another color as soon as I finish typing.

reviews.title: Runs much smaller/shorter than the Lone Peak 6, and much stiffer than expected
reviews.text: I own a pair of Lone Peak 6 size 11 which have a little toe allowance.  Same size 11 Olympus 4 literally had my toes scrunched along the front of the shoe!  May have to go one whole size up for proper fitting.  They also felt a LOT stiffer than the Lone Peaks, which surprised me given they are supposed to have maximum cushioning;  the Lone Peaks actually feel more cushy to me.  Returning the 11s and mulling over whether I should bother trying a 11.5 or a 12, considering how much stiffer they felt.

reviews.text:
I tear up any shoes in 3-4 months and these ones hold up the best (4+months ave.)…I’ve destroyed many pairs and won’t use anything else. They are comfortable and allow me to continue working out with aches or injury (from hiking every day).
Size 14 ft
Wgt 250
Ex-Athlete with numerous knee and back injuries
Hike 6 miles per day and workout in the gym to maintain good fitness level.
Neuropathy in feet.
Compression fractures in back (old injury)

These shoes are made for Clydesdale ex-athletes like myself…I‘be been using Altra for 4 years…

reviews.title: A good shoe
reviews.text: As this is my third pair of Altra Olympus shoes, I can say I am a happy customer. Each pair has lasted just over 1000 miles trekking over rough terrain. The Vibram is great but only holds out so long. Thank you Altra. Great customer service too. 😜

reviews.title: I'm waiting for the hiking day.
reviews.text: searched for these shoes after recommending them on Youtuber, but I bought them after thinking about it because I didn't like the color, but it's light and I'm waiting for the hiking day.

reviews.title: 8.5 was a 41? It should be 42
reviews.text: Ordered a us 8.5 and a 41 was delivered. Every other 8.5 I have ordered has said 42 as the size. This caused my toes rub and touch the ends of the shoe. I believe sizing is wrong. Has just for fun new fashion printed on the sides which make the shoes loook really cheap. Bottom green portion not as dark as product pictures bust is acceptable. Order half a size larger then normal.

reviews.title: A good pair of shoes
reviews.text: Bought for running but they are not performing well. They are too stiff. You get you what you pay for. So no complaints. They are surprisingly stylish. I wear them everyday.

reviews.title: Exactly as described

reviews.title: Worth it.

reviews.title: Soooo Comfortable
reviews.text: Ultra boost never disappoint. They are so comfortable and they look great too

reviews.title: excellent product.
reviews.text: excellent product.

reviews.title: Best in Class
reviews.text:
Adidas makes AMAZING running shoes. They're light as a feather and respond to your momentum. This pair also looks very stylish. I think it's a version of the shoe that many marathoners and Olympians wear. The knit makes them very breathable and easy to clean. They're also ideal if you like to run on vacation. They're easy to pack. Overall, I highly recommend these shoes.

Thanks so much for taking the time to read this review. I hope the information that I've provided helps make your decision a little easier.

reviews.title: Crazy expensive for Made in Vietnam, but I like them.
reviews.text:
These shoes have a weight of 12oz each. Not super heavy, but not super lightweight either. Though you can see a thick white foam on the sole. . .The thickness of the bottom of the shoe is only about an 1/8 of an inch. If you’re running on a track or treadmill, that will probably not be an issue. But if you’re running on the road, I doubt the tread is going to last too long.

Padding on the inside is super-firm. Nice arch support. Nice firm padding around the heel / ankle.

Mesh breathable upper. The upper is all one piece, and the tongue is not separate. As you can from the pictures. . . .The laces are placed through plastic “shields” on each side of the shoe.

These shoes are Made in Vietnam. They are comfortable, and there is extra “bounce”, but I can’t say that they are worth the crazy expensive price. Nonetheless, I really like them.

reviews.title: So comfortable... like walking on air!
reviews.text:
The Adidas men’s Ultraboost 21’s are amaaaazing quality sneakers. My son wanted them, and I myself was not too sure about the pink on the bottom, however my teenager doesn’t mind the color at all. He actually loves the color combination.

The fit is perfect, true to size... and they are SO comfortable... almost like walking on air! You get that little bounce when you walk, and even more when running. They are well cushioned to keep your feet happy. They are a bit pricey, but you get what you pay for and these are worth it!

title: Brooks Women's Ghost 14 Neutral Running Shoe
features: Imported
Rubber sole

THIS WOMEN'S SHOE IS FOR: Runners looking for a smooth ride that won’t distract from the fun of the run. The Ghost 14 offers a simplified midsole construction which creates more seamless transitions. This Brooks Ghost 14 is a certified PDAC A5500 Diabetic shoe and has been granted the APMA Seal of Acceptance.

SUPPORT AND CUSHION: The Ghost 14 offers neutral support while providing high energizing cushioning. Ideal for road running, cross training, the gym or wherever you might want to take them! Predecessor: Ghost 13

BALANCED, SOFT CUSHIONING: BioMoGo DNA and DNA LOFT cushioning work together to provide a just-right softness underfoot without losing responsiveness and durability - yet it feels lighter than ever. DNA LOFT now makes up the entire midsole, for a softer, smoother, ride.
SMOOTH, STABLE RIDE: No matter how your foot lands, our Segmented Crash Pad - an integrated system of shock absorbers - will cushion every step and stride for smooth heel-to-toe transitions.
SOFT, SECURE, FIT: More strategic use of the 3D Fit Print upper technology provides structure that moves with the foot.

reviews.title: Beware of imposters
reviews.text:
My original Brooks ripped in the seam so I ordered a new pair in Amazon. When they came they did not fit like my old ones at all.
I ended up contacting BrooksRunning directly and received the pair from them. TOTALLY PERFECT!!
What a difference from the ones purchased in Amazon. Even the labeling is different. Brooks is one of the most comfortable sneakers I have ever owned. I have four pairs. I did not have any luck through Amazon.

reviews.title: So comfortable!
reviews.text: Comfortable, good support, walked over 9 miles without blisters.  The laces were too short, but over all I highly recommend.

reviews.title: The perfect shoe for me.
reviews.text:
This is the third iteration of Brooks' Ghost running shoe that I've purchased. I have 8, 9, and now 14. These are the most comfortable shoes I own. They're supportive, have enough room in the toe box, and cushioning in the soles.
I'm glad they come in solid colors as well as multicolored. I plan to buy another pair of Ghost 14 in the solid grey option.

reviews.title: Comfy must-buy
reviews.text: These are comfortable right out of the box. They have good supportive insoles and are very cushioned while being surprisingly lightweight. I bought them for a trip to Disneyland so they will get quite a product test in and I'll update when I know more.

reviews.title: Comfort and quality
reviews.text: Brooks makes the best running shoe! So comfortable and attractive. They last forever, too!

title: Saucony Women's Switchback 2 Trail Running Shoe
description: Dialed to grip and rip trails fast. For trail runners looking to get to their destination fast, The lightweight Switchback 2 is a race-ready machine that delivers more of what you need—long-distance cushioning placed into a nimble, grippy, and dialed-in package.
features: Synthetic-and-mesh
Rubber sole
Toothy lugs made of PWRTRAC tacky rubber for grip
New pwrrun+ cushioning is 5% lighter for more protection and flexibility
New sock-like construction featuring a side-set boa lacing system

reviews.title: Love the idea, needs some redesign
reviews.text: I really want to like this shoe more. I do actually use them a lot but it took nearly half a year to really break them in, and they’re still fairly difficult to slip into, as the opening is not very flexible. The shoe itself is tight enough where the laces don’t even really need to be there, and the toe box is fairly narrow which isn’t very good for running and hiking. My pinky toe often feels wedged by this one part of the design and frequently causes pain. I really REALLY like the idea of this shoe though and it’s still wearable for moderate hikes under 2 hours, I just wish they put more work and testing. It’s probably better for people with thinner, narrower feet. My feet are medium wide and the top part is kind of high.

reviews.title: Fits just right
reviews.text: I like the way the shoes fit; however, they are more attractive in the picture than on my feet, at least to me.  They are a little pricey too, but all in all, I would recommend them.

title: Avia Avi Factor Slip On Girls' Sneakers - Lightweight Tennis, Athletic, Running Shoes for Girls - Toddler, Little Kid, and Big Kid Sizes 11 to 6
features: Rubber sole
PERFORMANCE SNEAKERS FOR GIRLS - A sturdy, dependable everyday sneaker that provides ultimate durability for active kids. The lightweight, breathable mesh overlays create comfort and ventilation.

SLIP ON, NO TIE LACES ALTERNATIVE CLOSURE - Gore, bungee, or toggle lace closures with no tying makes an easy, fast on and off option for toddlers, preschoolers, and kids of all ages. The perfect camp, sports, everyday, or back to school shoes! Available in sizes toddler 10 to big kid 6.
COMFORTABLE & DURABLE GIRLS ATHLETIC SHOES - The Avia compression molded EVA midsole and removable EVA sock add supportive cushioning for all-day wear.
COOL TODDLER & GIRLS SNEAKERS - In trendy, versatile colors, these running shoes go with everything in their wardrobes - and they stand out in the crowd!
NON-MARKING TPR SOLEPLATE - Kids will leave their mark on people, not on the ground or gym floor! The thick but light weight rubber sole holds up to everyday wear and play.

reviews.title: Great little athletic shoes
reviews.text: My daughter, age 5, wears a size 13(kid) and has a wide foot. These shoes fit nicely. I like that there isn't any velcro. Velcro never holds up well and everything gets stuck to it. These shoes are closer to the shoes that we'll be buying in the near future once my daughter masters tying laces. Highly recommend these shoes.

reviews.title: Pretty and comfortable but looked worn very quickly
reviews.text: My granddaughter loved these shoes - she loved the colors and the fit -  but they wore out in a matter of a few weeks.

reviews.title: True Size Fit
reviews.text: These girl's tennis shoes are so cute! They're also pretty comfortable. The slip-on feature is easy and the shoes stay on. Traction is good. They are true size fit. And they're very affordable.

reviews.title: Pretty
reviews.text:
They liked the rainbow sneakers. These sneakers were good. She could run in them without a problem.
These shoes are very nice. They were cute for my child. They thought they were comfortable. The fit was fine. They were able to use it for different situations. They were easy to put on and off. The quality seemed fine. They looked good on her. She liked them. The deal was fine. I would recommend them.

reviews.title: Comfortable
reviews.text: Fits as expected, pretty design and colors.  Comfortable,  well made, good brand.

title: New Balance Women's 510 V5 Trail Running Shoe
description: We stand for something bigger than sneakers. We champion those who are fearlessly driven by their passions. We elevate sport. We do right by people and the planet. Together, we drive meaningful change in communities around the world. We Got Now.
features: Imported
Rubber sole

Cushioned Running Shoes: ABZORB midsole technology in this runner absorbs impact through a combination of cushioning and compression resistance, and the rubber outsole provides strength and durability
Built-In Off-Road Technology: Toe Protect technology helps protect feet from rocks, roots and debris, while AT Tread on the outsole provides versatile traction during both on- and off-road activities
Plush, Cushioned Running Shoes: These runners feature lightweight injection-molded EVA foam midsoles to provide lightweight cushioning and an NB Soft + Supportive Insert for memory comfort that lasts
Built to Last: With an all-over durable construction and an aggressive lugged outsole, these trail running shoes are designed to stand up to all of your outdoor activities
Athletic Aesthetic: With synthetic and mesh uppers that deliver breathability and a top-quality fit, these running shoes also boast a stylish look to fit in with your active lifestyle

reviews.title: Great for trail hiking
reviews.text:
These are great! This is the second pair of owned, just a different color style this time.
I did notice one is a bit more snug than the other, but that could just be my foot. Also I know they'll stretch out over time. The comfort and support are great, the treads are just right for our rocky environment in southeast Oregon.
I'm usually a 9.5 W in some brands. I bought these in a 10 regular, not wide width. The length and width are just right for me.

These also have great support for cardio workouts and walking/hiking long distances, especially on rough terrain.

reviews.title: Fit as expected.
reviews.text: I use these for walking outside of the house, as I have a fractured spine and need the shock absorption and comfort.  These are perfect.  Thank you!

reviews.title: Love them
reviews.text: I love the design. They fit a little small but I’m sure they will stretch out a bit. They are very comfortable and have really good grip.

reviews.title: Must Buy

reviews.title: Less structured support, lots of rubber to the road
reviews.text: Really like these; plenty of expected toe room (hallelujah!👏)  The footbed is more flat and neutral than my other Adidas, but they’re good. Less support, but still comfy. I love Adidas balance between support and bounce; some shoes i have sunk into so hard, they’re too much work to wear for someone with extra weight! Then there are the hard-as-cardboard styles that offer so much “support” they’re painful and unbearable. Not these! They conform yet manage to be stable; balance, zen-like ✌🏼 I am now officially an Adidas lady for the haul, they’re impressive. Oh, these are a bit wide on me, likely perfect on an “average” width foot. Oh, that glorious toe room! 💜 and one more thing; the platform is wider than any other shoes I have, and actually was hard to get used to. But I have.

title: ASICS Women's GT-2000 9 Running Shoes
features: Synthetic-and-mesh
Imported

No-sew mesh upper:
Rearfoot and Forefoot GEL Technology Cushioning System: Attenuates shock during impact and toe-off phases, and allows movement in multiple planes as the foot transitions through the gait cycle.

FLYTEFOAM Midsole Technology: Our FLYTEFOAM technology provides exceptional bounce back and responsiveness no matter the distance, utilizing organic super fibers to help reduce packing out that traditionally happens with softer, low density foams.
Rearfoot and Forefoot GEL Technology Cushioning System: Attenuates shock during impact and toe-off phases, and allows movement in multiple planes as the foot transitions through the gait cycle.
FLYTEFOAM Technology: Provides lightweight cushioning.

reviews.title: Great running shoes
reviews.text: Love the fit and feel of these shoes. I always buy ASICS but decided to spend the extra money these after a friend recommended them. They are super light, very comfortable, and great to run in.

reviews.title: Great fit for narrow feet!
reviews.text: This is my third pair of ASICS. The narrow fit is perfect for my feet. Not keen on the color, but it was the only color available.

reviews.title: Ok
reviews.text: I do t feel like it supports my arch enough

reviews.title: GT2000 are always the best!
reviews.text: GT2000 are always the best! I tried something new last time and came back to these! 17 years running!

reviews.title: Perfect fit for my wide foot
reviews.text: Perfect. Wide size fits my fore foot with enough room in toe box. Longer shoestrings to accommodate extra width. Good arch support. Heel not too wide or too high like many are. Best fitting shoe Ive had on my foot in a while.
